info.title: GUML.Analyzer
info.description: GUML language analyzer for Godot .NET — provides Roslyn-based project analysis and LSP features via JSON-RPC

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: GUML language analyzer for Godot .NET — LSP server, static analysis, and formatting tool

options.name: --restart
options.description: Stop existing instances before starting [default: False]

commands.name: check
commands.description: Run static analysis on all .guml files in a Godot project

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text or json [default: text]

options.name: --severity
options.description: Minimum severity level: error, warning, info, or hint [default: info]

commands.name: format
commands.description: Format all .guml files in a project

options.name: --dry-run
options.description: Report files that need formatting without modifying them [default: False]

options.name: --tab-size
options.description: Number of spaces per indentation level [default: 4]

options.name: --use-tabs
options.description: Use tab characters instead of spaces for indentation [default: False]

commands.name: generate-api
commands.description: Generate Godot API metadata from XML documentation

options.name: --godot-version
options.description: Godot version to generate API for (e.g. 4.6.0)

options.name: --godot-source
options.description: Path to local Godot source tree
